/* Venues */ change mentions of "San Francisco" to "San Francisco Bay Area," which is the official name of the stadium in Santa Clara and how the region is referred to in press releases. Unlike other cities, the Bay Area is not synonymous with a core city. It has three core cities. "Bay Area" is always more appropriate than "San Francisco" alone.

/* Prize money */ Thank you to the IP user on the talk page for pointing out the error. I believe it's been fixed now. The reporting on this has been terrible with many recent publications using outdated figures. FIFA is misleading in saying a $10M qualification payment while including it as a performance payment – double counting. I believe the section is correct now. The mystery $200M non-performance amount is not included in the minimum amount, with 200-48*2.5 = $80M unclear how allocated.
